methodology.target_encoding: district price moments estimated on training split only
methodology.categorical_encoding: integer codes fitted on training split only; OOV -> 0
methodology.is_budget_definition: structural: area<30 and bedroom_count<=1 (no price in feature)
methodology.facility_count: sum of binary facility columns in FACILITY_KEYWORDS mapping
methodology.sample_weights: higher weight for price<100 and price>500 in training
methodology.n_estimators: 600 trees; eval_set held-out log-target for monitoring (no early stop if sklearn fit API lacks callbacks)
methodology.price_calendar_features: Per-unit aggregates (CALENDAR_FEATURE_NAMES): from MySQL price_calendars when training on MySQL; from Hive ODS ods_price_calendar when training on Hive (weekend premium may be 0 if not computed in the warehouse). Missing calendar imputed with train-split medians among units with calendar.

improvements: no_label_leakage: 行政区统计仅训练集
stratified_holdout: 按价格分桶分层留出
is_budget: 结构定义(面积+卧室数)，不含房价
facility_count: 与线上一致的二值设施求和
encoders: district + trade_area + house_type 持久化
price_calendar: 动态定价统计特征 + 训练集条件中位数填充
n_estimators=600: 固定轮数（环境不支持 fit 早停参数时）
